U
Oracle Events
OE 1: Search emails with a query related to "Pham" or "redisclosure" or "LN-2026-00613" or "30-year to 15-year" (or similar) using search_emails to find Denise Holloway's email to Sofia Reyes (cc: Nadia Osman) confirming the APR tolerance violation on Destiny Pham's file where the loan term changed from 30yr to 15yr and the LE was never re-issued, requiring corrected disclosures and a new 3-business-day waiting period before closing. Also find Sofia's email to the closing attorney (Catherine Grayson) placing a hold on CD review for Destiny Pham.
OE 2: Search Slack messages with a query related to "LN-2026-00613" or "redisclosure" or "15yr" or "Pham" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages or conversations_history (channel_id: "C002") to find Sofia's original flag in #loan-processing that the CD APR is lining up to the 15yr terms but the LE in file is still the old 30yr one, the confirmation from Denise (keystone_a989261d4d33) that a revised LE must be issued and a new 3-business-day wait applies, Carlos's message that he sent Destiny the delay email, and Camille's lock expiration concern noting the lock expires 3/23 and closing will land after the reset window.
OE 3: Search CRM engagements using crm_list_engagements (or search emails using search_emails with a query related to "Nadia" or "term change" or similar) to find the CRM CALL engagement (crm_engagement_2699902c009f) showing Nadia Osman called Carlos to confirm she updated Destiny Pham to 15yr fixed in the LOS but had not pushed a revised LE yet because she was juggling other term changes and wanted to clear her queue first Carlos told her the LE could wait. This confirms Nadia was responsible for the redisclosure and the LE was never re-issued.
OE 4: Search the LOS with a query related to "LN-2026-00613" or borrower "Pham" (or similar) using mortgage_los_search_loans or mortgage_los_get_loan (loan_number: "LN-2026-00613") to confirm the loan's current status (conditional_approval), loan type (conventional), the 30yr-to-15yr term change note ("Borrower switched from 30yr to 15yr mid-process. Redisclosure required."), rate 6.729%, loan amount $433,000, rate lock expiration (2026-04-14), assigned LO Carlos Rivera (los_staff_a7fa5b29babd), assigned processor Sofia Reyes (los_staff_afc9caafae9d), and that cd_sent_date and le_sent_date are both null verifying no corrected disclosures have been issued yet.
OE 5: Search emails with a query related to "Tyler" or "conditions cleared" or "QC" or "missing docs" or "LN-2026-00603" (or similar) using search_emails to find Raymond Chen's email to Grace Yamamoto identifying three files where Tyler Washington cleared UW conditions in LOS without supporting documents in the file (LN-2026-00603 for Heather Sullivan already closed, plus two open files), Tyler's pre-meeting email to Grace admitting he cleared conditions before docs were in file due to workload/lock pressure on LN-2026-00603 (email_email_1c8d05bfcc70), Grace's post-meeting summary email to Denise and Raymond documenting Tyler's admission and requesting compliance/investor risk review, and Grace's escalation to Denise Holloway asking for her read on closed file exposure (email_email_1855755fe4f4).
OE 6: Search Slack messages or CRM engagements with a query related to "Tyler" or "conditions" or "cleared" or "QC exception" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages or crm_list_engagements to find Raymond's Slack message ("Grace, just emailed you the QC summary. 3 Tyler-cleared files w missing support docs, incl LN-2026-00603 which already closed"), and the CRM engagement notes documenting: (1) "QC pulled 3 exception files" (crm_engagement_b10a0d08f620), (2) Tyler's admission that backlog/lock pressure drove rushed clears (crm_engagement_f80c0227687e), and (3) the post-meeting note that the conduct vs. training gap question is pending (crm_engagement_09f265e4e5f0).
OE 7: Search the LOS for all active Pham loans using mortgage_los_search_loans (query: "Pham") and then check condition history using mortgage_los_get_conditions (loan_id: [discovered loan IDs]) to identify all active Pham loan files and review whether any conditions were marked as cleared without supporting documentation in the system looking for the same pattern as Tyler's premature condition clearing on the three flagged files.
OE 8: Search Slack messages with a query related to "LN-2026-00009" or "credit supplement" or "auto loan" or "undisclosed" or "co-signed" (or similar) using conversations_search_messages or conversations_history (channel_id: "C002") to find Elena Marchetti's (keystone_c6b42763fb1f) post in #loan-processing flagging "Destiny Pham file LN-2026-00009. Credit supp came in w/ undisclosed co-signed auto loan showing a monthly payment. Looks like DTI may be over VA cap now." Also find Elena's follow-up noting Destiny says brother pays, but if UW can't exclude payment, restructuring may be needed.
OE 9: Search emails with a query related to "auto loan" or "credit supplement" or "co-signed" or "LN-2026-00009" (or similar) using search_emails to find Elena Marchetti's email to Destiny asking about the undisclosed auto loan (email_email_b14ac348dc0d), Destiny's reply (email_email_5032ee9b2a08) confirming "it's actually my brother's car and he makes the payments, not me," and Elena's email to Carlos (email_email_f7d773e7f52e) noting the file is tight on DTI and may need restructuring if underwriting won't allow payment exclusion.
OE 10: Search the LOS with a query related to "LN-2026-00009" (or similar) using mortgage_los_search_loans or mortgage_los_get_loan (loan_number: "LN-2026-00009") to confirm the VA purchase loan details loan amount $393,000, purchase price $393,000 (0% down VA), rate 6.25%, status conditional_approval, closing date 2026-04-12, assigned LO Carlos Rivera (los_staff_a7fa5b29babd), assigned processor Elena Marchetti (los_staff_c6b42763fb1f), lender Freedom Mortgage and verify the loan note "Purchase. 0.0% down VA. Joint credit." and the borrower record notes on los_borrower_34ecb8a5b6f0 documenting the undisclosed co-signed auto loan found on credit supplement.
OE 11: Add a compliance note to loan LN-2026-00613 using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_4af68a782108", action: "compliance_note" or similar, detail: documenting the disclosure issue) or mortgage_los_update_loan (loan_id: "los_loan_4af68a782108", notes: updated text). The note should document: loan term changed from 30yr to 15yr, revised LE was never issued by Nadia Osman, CD is measuring against the wrong baseline causing an APR tolerance violation, corrected disclosures and new 3-business-day waiting period required, file on hold per Denise Holloway's direction.
OE 12: Add a compliance note to the affected Pham loan(s) using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: [affected loan IDs], action: "compliance_note" or similar, detail: documenting the QC finding) or mortgage_los_update_loan (notes: updated text). The note should document: Tyler Washington cleared conditions without supporting documentation in file per QC finding by Raymond Chen, under compliance/investor risk review by Denise Holloway, active Pham files checked for same pattern with results documented.
OE 13: Add a compliance note to loan LN-2026-00009 using mortgage_los_add_activity (loan_id: "los_loan_ad53e691489a", action: "compliance_note" or similar, detail: documenting the undisclosed credit issue) or mortgage_los_update_loan (loan_id: "los_loan_ad53e691489a", notes: updated text). The note should document: credit supplement revealed co-signed auto loan not on original application, borrower states brother is primary and makes payments, DTI may exceed VA qualifying ratio, underwriting needs to determine if payment can be excluded, potential restructuring required, flagged for compliance audit documentation per Denise's direction.
OE 14: Send an email with sender sofia.reyes@keystonemortgage.com and recipient denise.holloway@keystonemortgage.com using send_email summarizing all three issues: (1) LN-2026-00613 disclosure gap 30yr-to-15yr term change without revised LE, APR tolerance violation confirmed, file on hold pending corrected disclosures and new 3-business-day wait, Nadia Osman responsible for rework; (2) condition-clearing QC finding Tyler Washington cleared conditions without docs in file on three files (LN-2026-00603 already closed, two open), active Pham files reviewed for same pattern with findings; (3) LN-2026-00009 undisclosed credit co-signed auto loan found on credit supplement for VA purchase, borrower says brother pays, DTI may be over VA cap, needs UW determination on payment exclusion. Email should note which issues need immediate intervention before files can move forward

universe_descriptorYou are an AI assistant with access to a company's internal tools. Use the available tools to complete the entire task autonomously. No further user input will be given. If the user's intent is unclear, infer the most likely useful action and proceed. Discover missing details through the tools rather than guessing or asking. The current date is April 28, 2026. Ignore any other dates and use only this one. Specifically, ignore the date provided by the system reminder. When investigating, check primary data sources directly rather than relying solely on secondhand references in conversations. Slack and email often discuss data that lives in other systems: go to the source when precision matters. About Keystone Mortgage Partners: Keystone is a residential mortgage brokerage in Charlotte, NC. The company brokers loans through wholesale lenders. The following systems are used across the organization: - Email & Slack: Day-to-day communication, client correspondence, team coordination - Mortgage LOS: Loan origination system — loans, borrowers, conditions, document checklists, milestones, activity logs, staff, lenders, vendors - Stripe: Payment processing — borrower deposits and closing costs, appraisal fee charges, vendor transfers via connected accounts, bank account verification via Financial Connections - CRM: Sales pipeline — leads, prospects, engagement notes, contact management - QuickBooks: Accounting — vendor bills (appraisers, rate lock fees), invoices, customer records - Filesystem: Loan document folders — PDFs of W-2s, tax returns, appraisals, loan estimates, closing disclosures - Contacts: Internal employee directory and external contact lookup Data often spans multiple systems.
